basic_details.job_title: GGSMCH Project Staff Nurse II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Guru Gobind Singh Medical College and Hospital, Faridkot
basic_details.short_information: GGSMCH Faridkot is recruiting nursing professionals for an important ICMR project focused on Neonatal Sepsis detection using AI in hospital settings.

application_fee.details: General Category: Rs. 1770/- (Rs. 1500 + GST Rs. 270) SC Category: Rs. 885/- (Rs. 750 + GST Rs. 135) | Fee to be paid to The Registrar, Baba Farid University of Health Sciences, Faridkot.

qualification.details: Essential: GNM (General Nursing Midwifery) Desirable: Neonatal and/or Pediatric Nursing experience | Nature of Duties: Rotational duties including night shifts in the Department of Pediatrics with only four offs per month.

selection_process: Candidates must bring all original documents on the interview day.
how_to_apply: Submit the completed application form along with fee and self-attested documents in the Principal Office, GGSMCH, Faridkot by 27 July 2026 (5:00 PM).
important_instructions: Posts are purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Initial appointment for 3 months with performance-based extension. Security deposit of half-month salary for first two months. No TA/DA will be paid. The competent authority reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download GGSMCH Faridkot Project Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download GGSMCH Faridkot Project Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: GGSMCH Faridkot Project Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Guru Gobind Singh Medical College and Hospital, Faridkot invites applications for Project Staff Nurse-II positions under the ICMR, New Delhi funded project titled "Development of an Early Warning System for Detection of Neonatal Sepsis using Artificial Intelligence for hospital settings". Download GGSMCH Faridkot Project Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: GGSMCH Faridkot Project Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: GGSMCH Faridkot is recruiting nursing professionals for an important ICMR project focused on Neonatal Sepsis detection using AI in hospital settings.

rows.guru_gobind_singh_medical_college_and_ho: Development of an Early Warning System for Detection of Neonatal Sepsis using Artificial Intelligence
3 months initially (extendable up to 28/02/2027 based on performance)
30 years as on 28/07/2026 (relaxation for SC/OBC as per Punjab Govt. rules)

content_sections.heading: GGSMCH Faridkot Project Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: Essential & Desirable Qualification
content_sections.text: Essential: GNM (General Nursing Midwifery) Desirable: Neonatal and/or Pediatric Nursing experience Nature of Duties: Rotational duties including night shifts in the Department of Pediatrics with only four offs per month.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: General Category: Rs. 1770/- (Rs. 1500 + GST Rs. 270) SC Category: Rs. 885/- (Rs. 750 + GST Rs. 135) Fee to be paid to The Registrar, Baba Farid University of Health Sciences, Faridkot.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Document Verification Written Test Interview Candidates must bring all original documents on the interview day.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Submit the completed application form along with fee and self-attested documents in the Principal Office, GGSMCH, Faridkot by 27 July 2026 (5:00 PM).

content_sections.heading: GGSMCH Project Staff Nurse II Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Posts are purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Initial appointment for 3 months with performance-based extension. Security deposit of half-month salary for first two months. No TA/DA will be paid. The competent authority reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for GGSMCH Faridkot Project Staff Nurse 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is on 28 July 2026 at 10:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there for Project Staff Nurse-II at GGSMCH Faridkot?
faq.answer: Total 02 posts are available.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Staff Nurse at GGSMCH Faridkot?
faq.answer: Rs. 22,000/- per month (including HRA).

faq.question: Q4. What qualification is required for GGSMCH Staff Nurse recruitment?
faq.answer: GNM (General Nursing Midwifery) is essential. Neonatal/Pediatric experience is desirable.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for GGSMCH Faridkot Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General: Rs. 1770/- | SC: Rs. 885/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for Project Staff Nurse-II at Faridkot?
faq.answer: 30 years as on 28/07/2026 (relaxation for SC/OBC as per rules).

faq.question: Q7. When is the last date to submit application for GGSMCH Faridkot?
Q8. Is there a written test for GGSMCH Staff Nurse selection?
faq.answer: Yes, a Written Test will be conducted along with the interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project duration for the Neonatal Sepsis AI project?
faq.answer: The project will complete on 28 February 2027.

faq.question: Q10. Will TA/DA be provided for the interview at GGSMCH Faridkot?
faq.answer: No, TA/DA will not be paid.
